expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and ties it to Phase 5a enforcement: “Benchmark focus: Review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes” and explains the mechanism: “Required audit section… per-node accounting… directly targets ‘silent dropping’…”, plus “Acceptance gate constraint: Phase 5a cannot accept while any coverage-preservation item is unresolved/`rewrite_required`.”

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly framed around Phase 5a: “Primary phase under test: Phase 5a” and the analysis is centered on Phase 5a artifacts/validators/gate (e.g., “Phase 5a `--post` gate requires a Coverage Preservation Audit…”; “Mandatory artifacts… `context/review_notes_<feature-id>.md`… `context/review_delta_<feature-id>.md`…”). execution_notes.md also confirms: “Verified Phase 5a contract includes explicit Coverage Preservation Audit requirements and an acceptance gate…”.
